revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Payoff matrix/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Payoff matrix/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Payoff matrix/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Payoff matrix/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Payoff matrix/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Payoff matrix/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
=== Usage ===
This template allows simple construction of 2-player, 2-strategy [[Normal form game|payoff matrices]] in [[game theory]] and other articles.
There are no required fields: *<u>Strategies</u> '''1U''', '''1D''' default to "Up", "Down", '''2L''', '''2R''' to "Left", "Right". *<u>Cell payoffs</u> '''UL''', '''UR''', '''DL''', '''DR''' all default to "0, 0". *The <u>Name</u> field defaults to the page name. *The <u>Float</u> field defaults to "right", but can also be set to "left" or "none" (for inline use). *The <u>Width</u> field defaults to "225" pixels (cell widths: 75|75|75), but can also be set to other absolute or percentage values.
Standard matrix format: <nowiki>{{</nowiki>Payoff matrix | Name = | 2L = | 2R = | 1U = | UL = | UR = | 1D = | DL = | DR = | Float = | Width = }}
Default color for all cells is white. To color the cells, include [[Web colors|color labels]] (e.g. "silver" or "#C0C0C0") in the '''ULc''', '''URc''', '''DLc''' and '''DRc''' fields: ULc = | URc = | DLc = | DRc = |
=== See also ===
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS -->
[[Category:Game templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[el:Πρότυπο:Πίνακας απολαβών]] [[hi:साँचा:Payoff matrix]] [[zh:Template:Payoff matrix]] [[he:תבנית:Payoff matrix]]
}}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
=== Usage ===
This template allows simple construction of 2-player, 2-strategy [[Normal form game|payoff matrices]] in [[game theory]] and other articles.
There are no required fields: *<u>Strategies</u> '''1U''', '''1D''' default to "Up", "Down", '''2L''', '''2R''' to "Left", "Right". *<u>Cell payoffs</u> '''UL''', '''UR''', '''DL''', '''DR''' all default to "0, 0". *The <u>Name</u> field defaults to the page name. *The <u>Float</u> field defaults to "right", but can also be set to "left" or "none" (for inline use). *The <u>Width</u> field defaults to "225" pixels (cell widths: 75|75|75), but can also be set to other absolute or percentage values.
Standard matrix format: <nowiki>{{</nowiki>Payoff matrix | Name = | 2L = | 2R = | 1U = | UL = | UR = | 1D = | DL = | DR = | Float = | Width = }}
Default color for all cells is white. To color the cells, include [[:en:Web colors|color labels]] (e.g. "silver" or "#C0C0C0") in the '''ULc''', '''URc''', '''DLc''' and '''DRc''' fields: ULc = | URc = | DLc = | DRc = |
=== See also ===
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS -->
[[Category:Game templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[el:Πρότυπο:Πίνακας απολαβών]] [[hi:साँचा:Payoff matrix]] [[zh:Template:Payoff matrix]] [[he:תבנית:Payoff matrix]]
}}</includeonly>

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
=== Usage ===
This template allows simple construction of 2-player, 2-strategy [[Normal form game|payoff matrices]] in [[game theory]] and other articles.
There are no required fields: *<u>Strategies</u> '''1U''', '''1D''' default to "Up", "Down", '''2L''', '''2R''' to "Left", "Right". *<u>Cell payoffs</u> '''UL''', '''UR''', '''DL''', '''DR''' all default to "0, 0". *The <u>Name</u> field defaults to the page name. *The <u>Float</u> field defaults to "right", but can also be set to "left" or "none" (for inline use). *The <u>Width</u> field defaults to "225" pixels (cell widths: 75|75|75), but can also be set to other absolute or percentage values.
Standard matrix format: <nowiki>{{</nowiki>Payoff matrix | Name = | 2L = | 2R = | 1U = | UL = | UR = | 1D = | DL = | DR = | Float = | Width = }}
Default color for all cells is white. To color the cells, include [[:en:Web colors|color labels]] (e.g. "silver" or "#C0C0C0") in the '''ULc''', '''URc''', '''DLc''' and '''DRc''' fields: ULc = | URc = | DLc = | DRc = |
=== See also ===
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS -->
[[Category:Game templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[el:Πρότυπο:Πίνακας απολαβών]] [[hi:साँचा:Payoff matrix]] [[zh:Template:Payoff matrix]] [[he:תבנית:Payoff matrix]]
}}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
=== Usage ===
This template allows simple construction of 2-player, 2-strategy [[Normal form game|payoff matrices]] in [[game theory]] and other articles.
There are no required fields: *<u>Strategies</u> '''1U''', '''1D''' default to "Up", "Down", '''2L''', '''2R''' to "Left", "Right". *<u>Cell payoffs</u> '''UL''', '''UR''', '''DL''', '''DR''' all default to "0, 0". *The <u>Name</u> field defaults to the page name. *The <u>Float</u> field defaults to "right", but can also be set to "left" or "none" (for inline use). *The <u>Width</u> field defaults to "225" pixels (cell widths: 75|75|75), but can also be set to other absolute or percentage values.
Standard matrix format: <nowiki>{{</nowiki>Payoff matrix | Name = | 2L = | 2R = | 1U = | UL = | UR = | 1D = | DL = | DR = | Float = | Width = }}
Default color for all cells is white. To color the cells, include [[:en:Web colors|color labels]] (e.g. "silver" or "#C0C0C0") in the '''ULc''', '''URc''', '''DLc''' and '''DRc''' fields: ULc = | URc = | DLc = | DRc = |
=== See also ===
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS -->
[[Category:Game templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[el:Πρότυπο:Πίνακας απολαβών]] [[hi:साँचा:Payoff matrix]] [[zh:Template:Payoff matrix]] [[he:תבנית:Payoff matrix]]
}}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
=== Usage ===
This template allows simple construction of 2-player, 2-strategy [[Normal form game|payoff matrices]] in [[game theory]] and other articles.
There are no required fields: *<u>Strategies</u> '''1U''', '''1D''' default to "Up", "Down", '''2L''', '''2R''' to "Left", "Right". *<u>Cell payoffs</u> '''UL''', '''UR''', '''DL''', '''DR''' all default to "0, 0". *The <u>Name</u> field defaults to the page name. *The <u>Float</u> field defaults to "right", but can also be set to "left" or "none" (for inline use). *The <u>Width</u> field defaults to "225" pixels (cell widths: 75|75|75), but can also be set to other absolute or percentage values.
Standard matrix format: <nowiki>{{</nowiki>Payoff matrix | Name = | 2L = | 2R = | 1U = | UL = | UR = | 1D = | DL = | DR = | Float = | Width = }}
Default color for all cells is white. To color the cells, include [[:en:Web colors|color labels]] (e.g. "silver" or "#C0C0C0") in the '''ULc''', '''URc''', '''DLc''' and '''DRc''' fields: ULc = | URc = | DLc = | DRc = |
=== See also ===
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS -->
[[Category:Game templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[el:Πρότυπο:Πίνακας απολαβών]] [[hi:साँचा:Payoff matrix]] [[zh:Template:Payoff matrix]] [[he:תבנית:Payoff matrix]]
}}</includeonly> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23525408989|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
=== Usage ===
This template allows simple construction of 2-player, 2-strategy [[Normal form game|payoff matrices]] in [[game theory]] and other articles.
There are no required fields: *<u>Strategies</u> '''1U''', '''1D''' default to "Up", "Down", '''2L''', '''2R''' to "Left", "Right". *<u>Cell payoffs</u> '''UL''', '''UR''', '''DL''', '''DR''' all default to "0, 0". *The <u>Name</u> field defaults to the page name. *The <u>Float</u> field defaults to "right", but can also be set to "left" or "none" (for inline use). *The <u>Width</u> field defaults to "225" pixels (cell widths: 75|75|75), but can also be set to other absolute or percentage values.
Standard matrix format: <nowiki>{{</nowiki>Payoff matrix | Name = | 2L = | 2R = | 1U = | UL = | UR = | 1D = | DL = | DR = | Float = | Width = }}
Default color for all cells is white. To color the cells, include [[:en:Web colors|color labels]] (e.g. "silver" or "#C0C0C0") in the '''ULc''', '''URc''', '''DLc''' and '''DRc''' fields: ULc = | URc = | DLc = | DRc = |
=== See also ===
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS -->
[[el:Πρότυπο:Πίνακας απολαβών]] [[hi:साँचा:Payoff matrix]] [[zh:Template:Payoff matrix]] [[he:תבנית:Payoff matrix]]
